---
title: "mnirs-cheatsheet"
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 0.5cm
      y: 0.5cm
    columns: 3
    column-gutter: 0.4cm
    keep-typ: false
    template-partials:
      - typst-template.typ
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=typst}
#set text(font: "Merriweather Sans", size: 8pt)
#set par(leading: 0.5em)
#show heading.where(level: 2): set text(size: 10pt, weight: "bold")
#show raw.where(block: false): it => box(
  fill: rgb("#f0f0f0"),
  stroke: rgb("#cccccc"),
  radius: 2pt,
  inset: (x: 3pt, y: 1pt),
  text(font: "Monaspace Neon Var", size: 7.5pt, it)
)
#show raw.where(block: true): set text(font: "Monaspace Neon Var", size: 7.5pt)

// Full-width header — spans all columns
#place(
  top + left,
  float: true,
  scope: "parent",
  clearance: 0.5cm,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: rgb("#0080ff"),
    radius: 4pt,
    inset: 8pt,
    [
      #grid(
        columns: (auto, 1fr),
        gutter: 8pt,
        align: horizon,
        [
          #image("mnirs-hex.svg", height: 1.8cm)
        ],
        [
          #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[mnirs]
          #h(0.6em)
          #text(size: 10pt, fill: white.transparentize(30%))[v0.4.2.2]
          #linebreak()
          #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[
            Muscle Near-Infrared Spectroscopy Processing and Analysis
          ]
          #linebreak()
          #v(0.2em)
          #text(size: 9pt, fill: white.transparentize(20%))[
            Read, process, and analyse data from muscle near-infrared spectroscopy (mNIRS) devices. Import raw data from .csv or .xls(x) files and return a time-series data frame with metadata. Includes standardised methods for cleaning, filtering, and pre-processing mNIRS data for subsequent analysis, with a custom plot theme and colour palette.
          ]
        ]
      )
    ]
  )
)

// Helper: code-shaded chip
#let chip(t) = box(
  fill: rgb("#f0f0f0"),
  stroke: rgb("#cccccc"),
  radius: 2pt,
  inset: (x: 3pt, y: 1pt),
  text(font: "Monaspace Neon Var", size: 7pt, t)
)
#let tree-line(indent, branch, content) = {
  text(font: "Monaspace Neon Var", size: 7.5pt)[#indent#branch ]
  content
  linebreak()
}

// Workflow — column 1
#align(center, block(
  stroke: rgb("#cccccc"),
  radius: 4pt,
  inset: (x: 10pt, y: 8pt),
  [
      #set align(left)
      #text(size: 12pt, weight: "bold")[Workflow]
      #v(0.3em)
      #set text(font: "Monaspace Neon Var", size: 12pt)
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("read_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("create_mnirs_data()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "└──", chip("example_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("resample_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("replace_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("replace_invalid()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("replace_outliers()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "└──", chip("replace_missing()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("filter_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("filter_ma()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "└──", chip("filter_butter()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("shift_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("rescale_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("", "├──", chip("plot.mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("theme_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("palette_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("scale_colour_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("scale_fill_mnirs()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "├──", chip("format_hmmss()"))
      #tree-line("│   ", "└──", chip("breaks_timespan()"))
      #tree-line("", "└──", chip("extract_intervals()"))
    ]
))
```

```{=typst}
#colbreak()
```

## Read

`read_mnirs()` — Import mnirs data from .csv or .xls(x)

#### Package-level functions

`example_mnirs()` — Paths to an included example file

`create_mnirs_data()` — Add *"mnirs"* class metadata to data

---

## Resample

`resample_mnirs()` — Resample to a regular time grid

---

## Clean

`replace_mnirs()` — Replace outliers, invalid, and missing data

#### Vector-level functions

`replace_outliers()` — Replace local outliers

`replace_invalid()` — Replace specified invalid values

`replace_missing()` — Interpolate over *NA* values

---

## Filter

`filter_mnirs()` — Apply digital filter to mNIRS channels

#### Vector-level functions

`filter_butter()` — Apply a Butterworth digital filter

`filter_ma()` — Apply centred moving average smoothing

---

## Transform

`shift_mnirs()` — Shift channels to a reference value

`rescale_mnirs()` — Rescale channels data range

---

```{=typst}
#colbreak()
```

## Plot

`plot()` — Plot a data frame of class *"mnirs"*

`theme_mnirs()` — ggplot2 theme for mnirs plots

`palette_mnirs()` — Access the mnirs colour palette

`scale_colour_mnirs()` — Colour scale with mnirs palette

`scale_fill_mnirs()` — Fill scale with mnirs palette

`format_hmmss()` — Plot axis in time units

`breaks_timespan()` — Plot axis with time breaks

---

## Extract

`extract_intervals()` — Detect events and extract intervals

```{=typst}
// Footer
#place(
  bottom + left,
  scope: "parent",
  float: true,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    [
      #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#cccccc"))
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#888888"))[
        #h(0.8em)
        Website: #link("https://jemarnold.github.io/mnirs/")[jemarnold.github.io/mnirs]
        #h(0.8em)
        GitHub: #link("https://github.com/jemarnold/mnirs")[github.com/jemarnold/mnirs]
      ]
    ]
  )
)
```
